description: A specialty coffee roastery in Dubai's creative district. We source single-origin beans from Ethiopia, Colombia, and Yemen, roast them in-house, and serve them in a minimalist industrial café. We also ship freshly roasted bags across the UAE and GCC. Known for our pour-over bar, cold brew on tap, and monthly cupping sessions.

owner.name: Khalid Al Dhaheri
owner.background: Emirati, 38, former oil & gas engineer who quit to pursue his obsession with specialty coffee. Trained at the London School of Coffee and did origin trips to Ethiopia and Colombia. Very hands-on, roasts every batch himself.

team_vibe: Young, passionate, nerdy about coffee. The kind of place where the baristas have opinions about water temperature. Casual, creative energy — Al Quoz art district vibes.
customers: Mix of Al Quoz creative professionals, specialty coffee enthusiasts, corporate offices ordering bulk, and tourists discovering real Arabic coffee culture.
brand_personality: Knowledgeable but never pretentious. We want people to love coffee more, not feel stupid about it. Think friendly professor, not snobby sommelier.
unique_selling_points: Only roastery in Dubai sourcing directly from Yemeni farms
Khalid personally visits every origin farm
Al Quoz location — art galleries, creative studios surround us
The cold brew is legendary — people drive across Dubai for it
